en-US.title: Dalee
en-US.subtitle: Five word games, daily
en-US.description:
Dalee is the daily word circuit — five bite-size word games, one fresh set every day. Everyone plays the same puzzles, so it's you against the day (and your friends).

Play the full circuit in about 25 minutes:

• Wordle — guess the five-letter word in six tries
• Scramble — unscramble the jumbled letters
• Ladder — change one letter at a time to reach the target
• Missing — fill in the blanks from a clue
• Blitz — find as many words as you can in 60 seconds

Rack up a daily score, build your streak, and come back tomorrow for a brand-new circuit. Beautifully designed, quick to play, and endlessly replayable.

— Five word games in one daily circuit
— A fresh set of puzzles every day
— Daily scores and streaks to keep you coming back
— Gorgeous, distraction-free design
— Free to play
en-US.promoText: Five word games, one a day. Wordle, Scramble, Ladder, Missing and Blitz — play the daily circuit in about 25 minutes and keep your streak alive.
en-US.releaseNotes: The Daily Circuit is here! Five word games every day — Wordle, Scramble, Ladder, Missing and Blitz — in a beautiful new design with daily scores and streaks.
